certifications.title: ANGULAR and ASP.NET Core REST API - Real World Application
certifications.skill: Developed scalable full-stack applications using Angular 20 and ASP.NET Core Web API, implementing RESTful APIs and RESTful API integration, JWT authentication, role-based authorization, CRUD operations, and SQL Server integration with Entity Framework Core.

certifications.skill: Building modern web interfaces using Angular, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS with component-based architecture, event-driven programming, UI components, and test-driven development (TDD).

certifications.skill: Completed professional training in Web Application Development with ASP.NET from BASIS Institute of Technology & Management (BITM), focusing on building dynamic web applications using C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and database integration.

certifications.title: Skill Development for Mobile Game & Application (UX and UI Design)
certifications.skill: Completed UX/UI Design training for Mobile Games & Applications under ICT Division, Bangladesh (US Software Ltd.), focusing on user experience and user interface design principles.

workshops.title: Time and Stress Management for Resilience
workshops.skill: Through the 'Time and Stress Management for Resilience' workshop, I've honed my skills in strategic prioritization and proactive stress reduction. This training has empowered me to enhance productivity while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. I am now better equipped to handle pressure and approach challenges with a focused, resilient mindset.

workshops.title: ESET PROTECT On-Prem
workshops.skill: Proficient in cybersecurity with expertise in Security & Policy Management and advanced Threat Detection & Protection using ESET solutions. I am skilled at implementing robust security protocols to safeguard critical assets, ensuring a resilient defense against emerging cyber threats and enabling organizational progress.

thesis.title: Examining the Role of Gamification and Use of M-Health Apps in the Context of Quit Smoking.
thesis.skill: This thesis explores the role of gamification in mobile health (mHealth) applications and how game-based elements can be used to address real-life health challenges. The study proposes a gamified mHealth application designed to support individuals who want to quit smoking by providing guidance, motivation, and behavioral support. The system integrates gamification techniques such as rewards, progress tracking, and goal-based activities to encourage user engagement and help users gradually reduce and quit smoking.
